meta.titleTemplate: Free Coconut Charcoal Samples — Factory Direct
meta.descriptionTemplate: Free coconut shisha charcoal samples from {{brand}}, {{port}}: real production stock, same-day dispatch — you pay only the courier. MOQ {{moqTons}} tons.

h1: Free coconut charcoal samples, shipped from the factory
heroSubtitle: Request real, lab-grade samples of our coconut shell shisha charcoal — drawn from current production, dispatched the same day. The sample is free; you pay only the courier to your door.
moqQualifier: A sample is the first step toward a wholesale order — our minimum is {{moqLabel}}. Test the coals in your own lab and on your own customers first; order the container once you are sure.

cta.leadPhotoAlt: A {{sampleTypicalKgLabel}} sample pack of coconut shell shisha charcoal briquettes ready for courier dispatch

I would like to request free samples of your coconut shisha charcoal. My details:

Shape(s) / grade(s) wanted: {{sampleSelection}}

Please confirm the courier cost to my country.

Thank you.

atAGlance.heading: Free samples at a glance
atAGlance.definition: A sample is a small, free quantity of our standard production charcoal — typically {{sampleTypicalKgLabel}}, up to {{sampleMaxKg}} kg for at-scale testing — shipped by air courier so you can verify the burn before committing to a {{containerType}} container.
atAGlance.costValue: Free — you pay only the courier
atAGlance.chooseValueTemplate: Any standard shape & grade ({{shapeCount}} shapes, {{gradeCount}} grades)
atAGlance.compareValueTemplate: Up to {{sampleComparisonMax}} shapes or grades in one shipment
atAGlance.shippingValueTemplate: Declared dangerous goods ({{unNumber}}) — we handle the paperwork

intro.p1: Serious buyers verify before they import. We make that easy: tell us the shape and grade you want, and we send real coals from current production — identical to what ships in your container — free of charge. You cover only the courier.
intro.p2: Below: proof that the samples are real, what you can request, how compliant dangerous-goods shipping works (we handle it), and the only cost involved.

video.heading: See a real sample shipment
video.posterAlt: Short video: coconut charcoal samples being packed, the dangerous-goods carton, and a burn test
video.label: Video: how a free coconut charcoal sample is packed and shipped
video.fallbackText: Your browser cannot play this video. Message us on WhatsApp and we will send it directly.
video.summary: A 60–90 second walkthrough of a real sample shipment: a {{sampleTypicalKgLabel}} sample drawn from current production and sealed, the dangerous-goods carton marked and declared as {{unNumber}} Class {{unClass}}, and a burn test showing the silver-white, low-residue ash. The same process applies to every sample we dispatch.
points: A {{sampleTypicalKgLabel}} sample sealed straight from current production
A burn test: light-up, working session, and the ash left behind

gallery.heading: Real samples, real packing

whatYouCanSample.intro: Sample any item from our standard catalog — your choice of shape and grade. Pick what matches your market.
whatYouCanSample.goldenSample: Samples are drawn from current production and standard stock — they are identical to what ships in your container, not a hand-picked "golden sample." What you test is what you get.
whatYouCanSample.comparisonTemplate: Benchmarking? Request up to {{sampleComparisonMax}} shapes or grades in a single shipment and compare them side by side before you decide.
whatYouCanSample.gradesNote: Each shape is available in all {{gradeCount}} grades — {{gradeNames}}.
whatYouCanSample.customNote: Custom shapes and bespoke sizes are produced at container scale and are not sampled individually. Browse the full catalog to choose a standard format to test.

shipping.h2: How sample shipping works — we handle it
shipping.body1: Coconut shell charcoal is classified as {{unNumber}}, Class {{unClass}} (self-heating). That sounds like a hurdle — it isn't, for you. We prepare the Class {{unClass}} dangerous-goods declaration and documentation and dispatch the same day. You simply receive the box.
shipping.body2: Sent by air, this material moves as declared dangerous goods under the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations through an approved courier account. We handle that declaration; or, if you prefer, you can book the pickup on your own courier account and we hand over a compliant, labelled package.

cost.intro: The sample is free. The only cost is the air courier to your door, billed at cost and confirmed when you request — it scales with weight up to {{sampleMaxKg}} kg.
cost.tableCaption: Indicative only · dangerous-goods handling included · confirmed at request · scales with weight up to {{sampleMaxKg}} kg.
cost.tableCaptionUpdatedTemplate: Indicative only · DG handling included · confirmed at request · scales with weight up to {{sampleMaxKg}} kg · last updated {{courierCostLastUpdated}}.
cost.proportionLine: Seen against a full {{moqTons}}-tonne container, a modest courier charge to verify the coals first is cheap insurance — the same layered cost discipline you would apply to any sea-freight quote.

documents.body: Ask for the lab paperwork alongside the physical sample and you can start evaluating on paper while the courier is still in transit: the {{sampleDocsList}}. Lower risk, faster yes.
documents.ctaNote: Request the sample and the documents together:

whyFactory.h2: Why request from us — and what happens next
whyFactory.body: We are the factory in {{city}}, not a trader: {{isoStandard}} production, third-party lab testing, and exports to {{countriesExportedCount}} countries. The sample you test is our standard output.
whyFactory.replyTemplate: Send your request and we typically reply within {{responseHours}} hours during office hours ({{officeHours}}, {{timezone}}). We confirm the courier cost, you approve, and we dispatch the same day from stock.

items.a: Yes. The charcoal sample itself is free. You pay only the air courier to your country, billed at cost and confirmed before we ship.
Typically {{sampleTypicalKgLabel}} — enough to run a full burn test — and up to {{sampleMaxKg}} kg if you need to test at scale.
Same day, from current stock. By {{sampleCarrier}} air courier, transit is typically about {{sampleTransitDays}} days depending on destination.

items.q: Is the sample the same as my container?
items.a: Yes. Samples are drawn from current production and standard stock — identical to container output, not a hand-picked showpiece.

items.q: Can I sample a custom shape?
items.a: Custom shapes and bespoke sizes are produced only at container scale, so they are not sampled individually. Any standard shape and grade can be sampled — across {{shapeCount}} shapes and {{gradeCount}} grades.

items.q: Why is there a courier cost, and who handles the dangerous-goods paperwork?
items.a: The coals are free; only the air courier is charged. Coconut charcoal ships as declared dangerous goods ({{unNumber}}, Class {{unClass}}) — we prepare the declaration and documentation and dispatch the same day.

items.q: Can I get the lab reports too?
items.a: Yes. Ask for the {{sampleDocsList}} and we send them alongside the sample so you can evaluate on paper while the courier is in transit.
We export to {{countriesExportedCount}} countries. Send your destination and we confirm courier availability and cost when you request.

finalCta.title: Request your free samples
finalCta.subtitleTemplate: Real coals from current production, dispatched the same day — your first step toward a {{moqLabel}} order. You pay only the courier.
